## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Okta and GrowthX to discuss progress on sales enablement artifacts and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team will focus on retail artifacts first, aiming to complete in \~3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Internal win notes and external case studies will be used to enrich artifact content](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [SDRs need better context on how Okta's solutions connect to business outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [Gem integration will be individual per SDR rather than a single shared version](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Team will refine prompt templates and instructions for more effective AI use](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

## Topics

### Artifact Development Timeline and Resources

  - [Aiming to complete artifacts in about 3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Will use internal win notes, external case studies, and persona docs to enrich content](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Challenge: balancing need for detailed insights with data sensitivity concerns](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [Solution: Experiment with using external-facing materials first, then carefully incorporate internal insights](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

### SDR Challenges and Needs

  - [SDRs struggle with understanding context and connecting Okta solutions to business outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [Example: An AE asked why Lululemon would buy Okta, showing knowledge gaps](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [Need: Clear explanations of how identity relates to personalization, modernization, and loyalty programs](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)

### Gem Integration Strategy

  - [Individual Gem instances for each SDR instead of a shared version](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Notebook LM will serve as the source of truth for content](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Need to develop better prompts and instructions for more effective AI use](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

### Account Brief and Prospecting Resources

  - [SDRs should study account briefs and prospecting resources for all their accounts](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [These materials provide valuable context on why specific solutions matter to prospects](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Example: Understanding why cart abandonment is important to a persona like Torsten](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### Industry Focus and Subject Matter Experts

  - [Immediate focus on retail, with hospitality considered a close cousin due to similar needs](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [Rachel to connect Sydney with healthcare and finserv subject matter experts for interviews](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
  - [Will clarify with Brad if separate persona/ICP docs exist for hospitality](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney to focus on developing account briefs](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [Kyle to work on refining instructions and prompt templates for AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [Rachel to connect Sydney and Kyle with industry subject matter experts (healthcare, finserv, possibly hospitality)](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
  - [Team to meet next week to review progress, even during Rachel's vacation](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
  - [Rachel to follow up with Brad on hospitality-specific persona/ICP documentation](https://fathom.video/share/gMczMNrpWHxRNwtBNJTH_vSs8z14npK6?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
